{"Id":"64bede3661c1f63d06e9d8c836bd703824257a2b","Status":4,"StatusText":"","AuthorEmail":"rutrac@microsoft.com","Author":"Rui Tracanas","Message":"fix: exclude IEnumerable<string> computed properties from Azure Table Storage serialization

Azure.Data.Tables SDK tries to serialize all public properties including the
computed Teams, Rosters, and Groups IEnumerable<string> properties.
Table Storage does not support collection types and returns InvalidInput (400).
The actual data is already stored in TeamsInString/RostersInString/GroupsInString.
Add [IgnoreDataMember] to suppress serialization of the computed properties.
